title: SASTFinding
description: A single security finding from a Java SAST scan. All Phase 2 skills MUST emit objects conforming to this schema.

id.description: Unique finding ID within this scan. Format: <SKILL_CODE>-<NNN>

skill.description: Which Phase 2 skill produced this finding

cwe.description: Primary CWE identifier — use the most specific leaf-node CWE available

severity.description: Severity aligned to CVSS score bands. Critical=9.0-10.0, High=7.0-8.9, Medium=4.0-6.9, Low=0.1-3.9, Informational=hardening only

confidence.description: High=taint path confirmed source→sink, no sanitizer. Medium=likely vulnerable but path has gaps OR sanitizer may be insufficient. Low=pattern match only, manual review needed.

file.description: Path relative to repo root to the file containing the sink

line.description: Line number of the sink expression in the file. NEVER fabricate — omit the finding if line cannot be determined.

class.description: Fully qualified class name containing the sink

evidence.description: Exact code snippet showing the vulnerability (1–3 lines max)

source.description: Where the tainted data originates from

taint_path.description: Intermediate steps in the taint flow from source to sink (empty array if source flows directly to sink)

sanitizer_present.description: True if any sanitizer was found anywhere in the taint path. When true, confidence MUST be Medium or Low.

sanitizer_detail.description: If sanitizer_present is true: what sanitizer was found and why it may be insufficient. Empty string when sanitizer_present is false.

remediation.description: Specific fix instruction referencing the actual code. Not generic advice — show exactly what to change.

references.description: External references: CWE links, OWASP pages, CVE numbers

false_positive_indicators.description: Patterns observed that reduce confidence this is exploitable — document why this might not be a real issue

duplicate_of.description: Set by Phase 3 (sast-report) if this finding duplicates another. Null when first emitted by Phase 2 skills.
